---
title: "Improving Methodological Research in Psychology: Preregistration, Transparent Reporting, and Benchmarking"
author: "Björn Siepe"
date: "2026-06-25"
categories: [Simulation Studies, Open Science, Metascience]
image: "prereg.png"
engine: knitr
comments: false
execute:
  freeze: true
description: "Talk at the Leibniz Instit für Bildungsverläufe (LIFBI, 2026), Bamberg, Germany"
license: "CC BY"
cv:
  pdf1: "LIFBI-Talk-Siepe-2026.pdf"
---


```{css echo=FALSE}
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 100%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}
.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 80%;
    height: 80%;
}
```

Find the slides here:

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf1`" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download PDF Slides
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf1`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
